title: POLK GED AND CAREER PATHWAYS PROGRAM - 211info
text: HENRY HILL POLK COUNTY YOUTH PROGRAM POLK GED AND CAREER PATHWAYS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides GED test preperation and assistance with GED test fees. Also provides a paid work experiance opptunity. Work experiance pays minimum wage and is a total of 200 hours (examples of work experiance include community garden, MakerSpace, city library, maintenance or local business) 750 5th Street S Independence, OR 97351 Eligibility: Ages 16-24 and not enrolled in highschool or college Hours: Phone Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 704-7820 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 704-7820 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more infomation. Enollorment process if eligablie is about 2 weeks. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Social Security card, photo ID, birth certificate, school transcript AREA SERVED: Polk County Services: GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction Youth Employment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HENRY HILL POLK COUNTY YOUTH PROGRAM
